name: Bug Report
about: Report something that isn't working correctly

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

```bash
# Paste the exact commands you ran
cpin add src/main.c:10 "my note"
cpin list src/main.c
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include any error output.

```
# paste output here
```

## Environment

- OS: (e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04)
- Compiler: (e.g. clang 15, gcc 12)
- cpin version / commit: (run `git log -1 --oneline`)

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or notes.
